fields.triggerPrefixesHint: Directories that spark voyages. Overrides working deck filtering when set.
fields.driftIgnoreRulesHint: Glob-aware Terraform address + attribute paths suppressed by the adrift classifier. <star></star> matches zero or more non-<dot></dot> chars (spans <n></n> indices); <starIdx></starIdx> matches any bracketed index. A bare address wi'' nay attribute suffix silences any change to that spoil — including destroys. Affects adrift only, not regular chart/lay down. See <docs>drift-ignore-rules.md</docs> fer the full grammar.
fields.driftIgnoreRulesNone: Nary a one (every chart diff counts as adrift)

vcsWorkflowWarning.title: Authorization delegated to yer VCS port.
vcsWorkflowWarning.rbac: Anyone who can merge the PR can lay down. Channel protection rules (be needed reviews, status checks, code owner approval) become the gate. Terrapod rank/mark RBAC doesnot lay down to comment-driven deeds in this mode.
vcsWorkflowWarning.recommended: Recommended: require linear history (rebase/squash before merge) so the log entry ye lay down be the log entry that lands.
vcsWorkflowWarning.credit: Credit: this workflow be modelled on <atlantis>Atlantis</atlantis>. Atlantis remains the right tool fer crews who only want PR-comment-driven applies an'' nay platform UI.

lock.title: Chain Status
lock.lockedDesc: This work deck be chained. Nay charts or applies can voyage.
lock.unlockedDesc: This work deck be unchained an'' ready fer voyages.

drift.title: Adrift Detection
drift.dismissTitle: Clear the reported adrift ship''s log. The next scheduled check shall repopulate it from reality.
drift.checkNowTitle: Line up a plan-only voyage to check fer adrift

planExpiry.title: Chart Expiry
planExpiry.description: Auto-discard an unconfirmed chart once it be older than this, so a stale chart can''t be laid down against a moved world. Off by default; the chart must then be re-run. (Applies to apply-capable voyages only.)

aiSummary.title: AI Chart Summary
aiSummary.description: Automatic LLM-generated change summary, risk assessment, an'' wreck analysis on every plan-phase outcome fer this work deck.
aiSummary.contextPlaceholder: Facts the AI should know about this work deck specifically. e.g. ''Fronts the vault fer service X — sendin'' to Davy Jones the KMS key causes a global outage.''
aiSummary.contextHint: Mustered on top o'' deployment-wide context. Max 4000 characters.

slack.title: Slack messages in a bottle
slack.description: Opt this work deck into Slack voyage messages in a bottle — approval askin''s, applies, troubles, an'' adrift. Part ways the channel empty an'' this work deck stays silent (yonder be nay deployment-wide fan-out). Requires the Slack app to be aye, hoisted by an cap''n.
slack.hint: The Slack app must already be a crewmate o'' the channel.

delete.description: Permanently scuttle this work deck an'' all associated ship''s log, variables, an'' voyages.

variables.empty: Nay variables configured fer this work deck.

runs.queueApplyConfirm: Line up a chart + lay down voyage? This can change infrastructure.
runs.nonDefaultRefNote: Non-default ref picked — voyage shall be plan-only
runs.empty: Nay voyages yet fer this work deck.

state.deleteConfirm: Scuttle ship''s log mark #{serial}? This cannot be undone.
state.rollbackConfirm: Haul back to ship''s log mark #{serial}? A new mark shall be forged wi'' the same content.
state.empty: Nay ship''s log marks yet fer this work deck.

configurations.description: Uploaded source archives fer this work deck, newest first. Pick two rows to compare.
configurations.empty: Nay configuration marks yet. They appear here as soon as a `terraform chart` uploads or a VCS push sparks a voyage.
configurations.oversized: Skipped {count, plural, one {# oversized file} other {# oversized files}}: {files}
configurations.noDiff: Nay content differences between these marks.
configurations.binaryChanged: Binary file changed — diff not rendered.

notifications.name: Name
notifications.empty: Nay message in a bottle configurations fer this work deck.
notifications.enableConfirm: Hoist this message in a bottle?
notifications.disableConfirm: Lower this message in a bottle?

runTasks.name: Name
runTasks.empty: Nay voyage tasks configured fer this work deck.

runTriggers.title: Voyage Sparks
runTriggers.description: When a source work deck completes an lay down, downstream work decks get a new voyage lined up automatically. Up to 20 source work decks per destination.
runTriggers.inboundHeading: Source work decks that spark voyages here
runTriggers.inboundEmpty: Nay source work decks spark voyages on this work deck.
runTriggers.pickerPlaceholder: Scout work decks to muster as a source…
runTriggers.outboundHeading: Destination work decks this work deck sparks
runTriggers.outboundEmpty: This work deck does not spark voyages on any other work deck.

sharing.title: Remote Ship''s log Sharing
sharing.description: Producer-controlled allowlist fer cross-workspace . Ship''s log data be secret-bearing — grant deliberately. Scrolls
sharing.outboundHeading: Work decks authorized to read this workspace''s ship''s log
sharing.outboundEmpty: This workspace''s ship''s log be not shared wi'' any other work deck.
sharing.revokeConfirm: Cast off this remote ship''s log sharing? The consumer shall lose access to this ship''s log.
sharing.pickerPlaceholder: Scout work decks to authorize as a consumer…
sharing.inboundHeading: Work decks this work deck be authorized to read ship''s log from
sharing.inboundEmpty: This work deck be not authorized to read ship''s log from any other work deck via terraform_remote_state.

runMessages.destroyQueued: Send to Davy Jones lined up from UI

errors.loadStateVersions: Couldn''t haul in ship''s log marks
errors.loadNotifications: Couldn''t haul in messages in a bottle
errors.loadOutboundConsumers: Couldn''t haul in outbound remote-state consumers
errors.loadInboundConsumers: Couldn''t haul in inbound remote-state consumers
errors.loadInboundTriggers: Couldn''t haul in inbound voyage sparks
errors.loadOutboundTriggers: Couldn''t haul in outbound voyage sparks
errors.downloadStateFile: Couldn''t haul down ship''s log file
errors.downloadTicketMissingUrl: Haul down ticket response missing URL
errors.labelLockout: This mark change would reduce yer access.
errors.updateAiSummary: Couldn''t refit AI summary riggin'' o'' the ship
errors.updateDriftSettings: Couldn''t refit adrift riggin'' o'' the ship
errors.queueDestroy: Couldn''t line up send to Davy Jones
errors.queueDestroyStatus: Couldn''t line up send to Davy Jones ({status})
errors.createNotification: Couldn''t forge message in a bottle
errors.createNotificationStatus: Couldn''t forge message in a bottle ({status})
errors.toggleNotification: Couldn''t toggle message in a bottle
errors.deleteNotification: Couldn''t scuttle message in a bottle
errors.rollbackStateVersion: Couldn''t haul back ship''s log mark
errors.uploadStateFile: Couldn''t haul up ship''s log file

stateTab.loadError: Couldn''t haul in the ship''s log graph.
stateTab.emptyState: Nay ship''s log yet — voyage a chart an'' lay down, or haul up ship''s log, then this graph shall populate.
stateTab.truncated: Showing the first {shown} o'' {total} spoils — the graph be capped fer legibility.

impact.notAvailable: Impact graph be not at the ready fer this voyage.
impact.title: Impact graph
impact.subtitle: chart o'' {count, plural, one {# spoil} other {# spoils}}
impact.hint: Each sphere be a spoil; each arrow points to what it depends on. Click a node → its transitive impact (everything downstream) lights up.

estate.navHint: Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom · right-drag to pan · click a node to orbit around it

state3d.title: Ship''s log graph
state3d.hint: Each sphere be a spoil; each arrow points to what it depends on. Click a node → the spoils that transitively depend on it light up.

resource3d.navHint: Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom · right-drag to pan · click a spoil to orbit around it

delete.heading: Scuttle Execution Hook
delete.description: Permanently scuttle this hook an'' cast off it from all work decks.

workspaces.scopeNote: This hook voyages only on the work decks associated below. Yonder be nay global scope.
workspaces.empty: Nay work decks associated wi'' this hook.

confirm.removeWorkspace: Cast off this work deck from the hook? The hook shall nay longer voyage fer it.

policySetDetail.subtitle: OPA code o'' conduct · forged by {createdBy}

policies.heading: Codes ({count})
policies.vcsManaged: Commanded by port — push changes via PR
policies.empty: Nay codes in this set yet.

addPolicy.regoHint: Rego v1. Must declare package terrapod an'' express violations via a deny set. The chart be input; Terrapod context be data.terrapod_context.

confirm.deleteSet: Scuttle this code o'' conduct an'' all its codes? Recorded voyage evaluations be kept.

errors.load: Couldn''t haul in code o'' conduct

confirm.prompt: Link this Slack berth to yer Terrapod identity? Every future Slack deed (approve/discard) shall voyage as this Terrapod hand wi'' their permissions.
confirm.warning: Only continue if ye just set sail this link from Slack yerself. If ye didn''t, batten this tab an'' don''t link — this binds the Slack berth above to yer Terrapod identity.

success.message: Yer Slack berth be now linked to Terrapod.
success.linkedAs: Linked as {email}. Ye can batten this tab an'' return to Slack.

errors.missingLink: Missing or not shipshape link. Set sail again, matey wi'' the Terrapod link command in Slack.
errors.invalidLink: This link be not shipshape, run dry, or already used. Set sail the link again, matey from Slack.

success.title: Boardin'' Victorious
success.complete: API doubloon forged. Ye can batten this tab.

fallback.description: Could not reach the CLI automatically.

timeout.description: The CLI may not have completed the doubloon exchange. Check yer terminal.
